title: Pass only assigns, not the socket, into a helper
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/report_header_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ReportHeaderLive) with a render/1 that calls a private helper format_header/2 receiving (user, date) — NOT the full socket or assigns. mount/3: assign :current_user %{name: "Ada"} and :report_date ~D[2026-01-01]. The helper must be named format_header/2 and take two positional args. Do not pass @socket or assigns.
tier_rationale: Canonical refactor: helper takes what it needs, not the socket. Single-name renaming + signature.
research_citation: John Elm Labs anti-patterns: 'Don\'t Pass the Socket as an Argument to Functions'
